BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: LOS ANGELES JEWISH HOME FOR THE AGING

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: NURSING, RESIDENTIAL AND CLINICAL CARE FOR THE ELDERLY.
IRS990.MissionDesc: EXCELLENCE IN SENIOR CARE REFLECTIVE OF JEWISH VALUES.
IRS990.Desc: DEVELOPMENT AND OPERATIONS OF AN INDEPENDENT LIVING FACILITY THAT PROVIDES MEMORY CARE SERVICES.

ProgSrvcAccomActy2Grp.Desc: FUNDING ORGANIZATION AND MANAGEMENT SERVICES FOR RELATED ORGANIZATIONS: EISENBERG VILLAGE OF THE LOS ANGELES JEWISH HOME FOR THE AGING, GRANCELL VILLAGE OF THE LOS ANGELES JEWISH HOME FOR THE AGING, JHA GERIATRIC SERVICES, ANNENBERG SCHOOL OF NURSING AND BRANDMAN CENTERS FOR SENIOR CARE, INC.

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART II, LINE 10, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: SETTLEMENT OTHER INCOME - 2019 AMOUNT: $ 437. 2021 AMOUNT: $ 146,600. 2022 AMOUNT: $ 188,783. 2023 AMOUNT: $ 55,561.

OtherAssetsOrgGrp.Desc: FUNDS HELD BY TRUSTEE UNDER DEBT AGREEMENT

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: ENDOWMENT FUNDS ARE USED TO SUPPORT OPERATIONS.

WITH THE EXCEPTION OF THE IPA, LAJH IS EXEMPT FROM TAXATION UNDER SECTION 501(C)(3) OF THE INTERNAL REVENUE CODE AND SECTION 23701D OF THE CALIFORNIA REVENUE AND TAXATION CODE AND IS GENERALLY NOT SUBJECT TO FEDERAL OR STATE INCOME TAXES. HOWEVER, LAJH IS SUBJECT TO INCOME TAXES ON ANY NET INCOME THAT IS DERIVED FROM A TRADE OR BUSINESS, REGULARLY CARRIED ON, AND NOT IN FURTHERANCE OF THE PURPOSES FOR WHICH IT WAS GRANTED EXEMPTION. NO INCOME TAX PROVISION HAS BEEN RECORDED AS THE NET INCOME, IF ANY, FROM ANY UNRELATED TRADE OR BUSINESS, IN THE OPINION OF MANAGEMENT, IS NOT MATERIAL TO THE CONSOLIDATED FINANCIAL STATEMENTS TAKEN AS A WHOLE. LAJH RECOGNIZES THE TAX BENEFIT FROM UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS ONLY IF IT IS MORE-LIKELY-THAN-NOT THAT THE TAX POSITIONS WILL BE SUSTAINED ON EXAMINATION BY THE TAX AUTHORITIES, BASED ON THE TECHNICAL MERITS OF THE POSITION. THE TAX BENEFIT IS MEASURED BASED ON THE LARGEST BENEFIT THAT HAS A GREATER THAN 50% LIKELIHOOD OF BEING REALIZED UPON ULTIMATE SETTLEMENT. THERE WERE NO UNCERTAIN TAX POSITIONS AS OF AUGUST 31, 2024 OR 2023.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCH D PART V LINE 1B COLUMN (D):
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: IN FISCAL YEAR 2021, THERE WAS A NEGATIVE ADJUSTMENT FOR CONTRIBUTIONS DUE TO THE RESTRUCTURING OF A PLEDGE.
ALL BONUSES PAID BY THE ORGANIZATION ARE DISCRETIONARY.

ISSUER NAME: CA STATEWIDE COMMUNITIES DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY DATE THE REBATE COMPUTATION WAS PERFORMED: 09/26/2019 ISSUER NAME: CA STATEWIDE COMMUNITIES DEVELOPMENT AUTHORITY DATE THE REBATE COMPUTATION WAS PERFORMED: 08/09/2019

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 2
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: R HIRSCH AND S HIRSCH WOHL HAVE A FAMILY RELATIONSHIP.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE FORM 990 WILL BE REVIEWED BY THE VOTING MEMBERS OF THE BOARD OF DIRECTORS PRIOR TO SUBMISSION.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: THE ORGANIZATION ANNUALLY RECEIVES A SIGNED CONFLICT OF INTEREST DISCLOSURE STATEMENT FROM EACH ACTIVE BOARD MEMBER AND OFFICER. THE DISCLOSURES ARE REVIEWED BY THE BOARD, AND IF NECESSARY, ARE FURTHER DISCUSSED UNTIL A DETERMINATION IS MADE AS TO WHETHER A CONFLICT OF INTEREST EXISTS. THE ORGANIZATION WILL TAKE APPROPRIATE ACTION, DEPENDENT ON THE OUTCOME OF THE ABOVE REFERENCED DISCUSSION, AND IF NECESSARY, THE INTERESTED PERSON WILL RECUSE THEMSELVES FROM THE DELIBERATIONS AND DECISIONS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 15
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: POLICY FOR DETERMINATION OF EXECUTIVE COMPENSATION, OFFICERS AND TOP MANAGEMENT INCLUDES REVIEWING COMPARABILITY DATA FROM NUMEROUS SALARY AND COMPENSATION SURVEYS AND THE FORM 990 DATA OF SIMILAR ORGANIZATIONS. THE COMPENSATION FOR TOP MANAGEMENT IS DETERMINED BY THE EXECUTIVE REVIEW COMMITTEE AND APPROVED BY THE FULL EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE BOARD. COMPENSATION IS REVIEWED FOR OFFICERS AND TOP MANAGEMENT ON AN ANNUAL BASIS.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY AND FINANCIAL STATEMENTS ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON REQUEST.
UNRELATED BUSINESS TAXABLE INCOME -4,390. OTHER CHANGES IN NET ASSETS 57,934.
